summary: China’s latest export data is offering an early glimpse into how higher fossil fuel prices may be reshaping trade in clean energy technology. Shipments of solar products, batteries and electric vehicles rose sharply in recent months, with some of the strongest growth coming from emerging markets that are heavily exposed to oil and gas imports. The figures arrive as many fuel-importing economies face renewed pressure from elevated energy prices. While it remains too early to draw firm conclusions

title_cn: Fluence 因 Nvidia 人工智能数据中心工厂设计而股价飙升
summary: Fluence Energy Inc. shares soared more than 40% after the US energy storage company said it collaborated with Siemens AG and Nvidia Corp. to develop a design for artificial intelligence data centers.

summary: Michael Schiebe, head of Mercedes-AMG, discusses the automaker’s new GT 4-door coupe and the market for luxury electric vehicles as the company prepares to launch more than 27 new electric and combustion engine vehicles in the next 36 months. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Crude Refiners Are Pushing Run Rates to Maximum Levels
title_cn: 美国原油炼油厂正在将运行率推至最高水平
summary: US oil refiners are running their plants harder than usual, with some even putting off maintenance, as strong profits and steady demand for fuels tempt the processors to run plants near maximum capacity.

title: S&P 500 Hangs Close to Record as Tech Gains Offset Broad Losses
title_cn: 标普 500 指数接近创纪录水平，科技股上涨抵消了广泛损失

title: CoreWeave-Tied Data Center’s Junk Bond Sale Seeks $850 Million

summary: Elk Grove Village Property LLC is looking to raise $850 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., joining a wave of high-yield issuers tapping debt markets to fund artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data
title_cn: 债券交易员押注美联储加息，准备从就业数据中进行深入检查
summary:
Bond traders are looking to a key jobs report this week to confirm their wagers that the US economy is strong enough to push the Federal Reserve to lift interest rates by next year.
Nancy Lazar, Chief Global Economist a Piper Sandler, previews this week's jobs figures and whether or not they'll put the Fed in a position to hike rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Taylor Morrison Soars on Berkshire Deal; IBM Jumps on Trump Mention | Stock Movers
title_cn: 泰勒·莫里森 (Taylor Morrison) 因伯克希尔交易而股价飙升； IBM 对特朗普的提及跃跃欲试库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Shares of Taylor Morrison Home Corp. (TMHC) soared in premarket trading after Berkshire Hathaway said it will acquire the homebuilder in an all-cash deal worth about $6.8 billion. It marks the first major purchase under chief executive Greg Abel and a vote of confidence in the US housing market. 
- Shares of MGM Resorts International (MGM) rallied ahead of the US market open after the New York Times’ DealBook reported that Barry Diller’s People Inc. is preparing an offer to buy its unowned portion of the casino giant at an $18 billion valuation. 
- Shares of IBM (IBM) jumped in the early session after a video of President Trump praising the company’s CEO and discussing the stock at a December event recirculated on social media over the weekend. In the clip, Trump says IBM CEO Arvind Krishna had “taken the stock from a rather low price to a very nice price.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meredith Whitney Expects Worse Housing Market Than Last Year
title_cn: 梅雷迪思惠特尼预计房地产市场将比去年更差
summary: Meredith Whitney Advisory Group CEO Meredith Whitney says she doesn't think housing demand will be very strong this year with affordable housing remaining the key challenge. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Everything Is Warming Up
title_cn: 一切都在变暖
summary: Inflation, but also growth.

title: AI Compute to Become a Wall Street Asset
title_cn: 人工智能计算将成为华尔街资产
summary: Wall Street may be creating the first market for AI compute. Silicon Data CEO Carmen Li joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI futures could become as important as oil futures, how companies will hedge higher GPU costs, and why AI token prices are still rising despite more efficient models. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FS KKR Is Selling $400 Million Bonds in Rare Junk-Rated BDC Deal

summary: A private credit fund jointly managed by Future Standard and KKR & Co. is looking to sell at least $400 million of junk bonds, according to people familiar with the matter, in a rare high-yield offering by a publicly traded credit fund.

summary: Colombia’s stocks leaped by the most in over six years and bonds and the currency surged after right-wing outsider Abelardo de La Espriella unexpectedly won the first-round of voting for the presidency and went into the runoff as clear favorite against leftist Ivan Cepeda.

title: AI Rally, Haven Flows Boost Trader Bets on Further Dollar Gains

summary: A nearly six-month old video of Donald Trump praising International Business Machines Corp.’s CEO sent the shares surging almost 9% on Monday, adding more than $24 billion to the company’s stock-market value.

title_cn: 随着需求减弱，南非工厂信心恶化
summary: South Africa’s manufacturer sentiment worsened in May as demand slumped and supply disruptions due to the Iran war continued.

summary: Shares of FedEx Corp.’s former freight division fell on Monday in their first day of trading as an independent, publicly held company.

title: Nvidia Is Taking On Intel and AMD With AI Chip for Computers
title_cn: Nvidia 正在通过计算机人工智能芯片挑战英特尔和 AMD
summary:
Nvidia Corp. is entering the PC market with a new chip aimed at loosening the stranglehold of Intel Corp. technology in that arena and modernizing the machines for the AI era.
Mandeep Singh, Global Tech Research Head at Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the move and what it means for the future of computing. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Weeks after Michael Saylor opened the door to selling Bitcoin, Strategy Inc. disposed of about $2.5 million of the cryptocurrency, a symbolic break from the maximalist playbook that helped make the company one of the market’s largest buyers and the token’s biggest corporate holder.

title: JPMorgan Casts Doubt on Speculative Tech After 57% Rally

summary: The riskiest corners of the tech sector are outperforming their larger peers at the fastest pace in nearly six years. Now, many on Wall Street are sounding a warning to investors holding those stocks: Get out while you can.

title: AI Is Forcing Big Law to Rethink Business as Usual
title_cn: 人工智能正在迫使大型法律重新思考一切如常
summary: In 2021, Volkswagen AG approached the global law firm Freshfields with a problem. The German carmaker’s technology unit was preparing to release new software features and wanted to make sure that they would be compliant in the more than 100 countries where Volkswagens are sold. Ordinarily, Freshfields said, it would bring in lawyers from each jurisdiction to vet the updates, budgeting thousands of euros per country — a process that would need to be repeated if any components changed in the futur

title: France Has Compelling Advantage to Attract Data Centers, Cagni Says
title_cn: 卡尼表示，法国具有吸引数据中心的巨大优势
summary: French Ambassador for International Investments and President of C4 Industries Pascal Cagni joins Bloomberg's Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Brief" to discuss foreign investments in France as French President Emmanuel Macron announced €93 billion ($108 billion) investment pledges at the "Choose France" summit.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revolut Vows to Hire 200 More France Staff in Europe Growth Push

title: Economist Slok Doesn’t Expect an AI Impact on May Jobs Report

title: AI Rally Has 'Room To Go' Says Ozan Tarman
title_cn: 奥赞·塔曼表示人工智能拉力赛还有“发展空间”
summary:
The artificial-intelligence trade locked in fresh gains on Monday, allowing global equities to shrug off a rebound in oil prices as the US and Iran remained deadlocked over a peace deal. Ozan Tarman, Global Macro Vice Chair at Deutsche Bank joined Stephen Carroll and Lizzy Burden to discuss the the moves in stocks as where Bond yields go from here. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Valve’s Hard-Line Tactics Clash With Founder’s Reputation as Benevolent Gamer

summary: “The technology worked. The value didn’t arrive,” Bain concluded in the report.

title: MediaTek's Hu on Business Acceleration on AI
title_cn: 联发科技胡先生谈人工智能业务加速
summary: MediaTek, Taiwan’s foremost designer of chips for mobile devices, is hiring more engineers on expectations of revenue to multiple in 2027 from its developing AI data center business. Vince Hu, MediaTek, Corporate Senior Vice President, speaks with Bloomberg News' Stephen Engle at COMPUTEX 2026 in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Deutsche Bank Says AI, Not Iran, Is the Key Narrative for Stocks

title: Valve, the Anticorporate Hero of the Games Industry, Has Its Antitrust Moment
title_cn: Valve，游戏行业的反企业英雄，迎来了反垄断时刻
summary: Lawsuits in the US and the UK allege the company’s Steam store is abusing its market power. Valve disagrees.

title: Nvidia to Debut New Chip for Laptops, Desktop Computers
title_cn: Nvidia 将推出用于笔记本电脑和台式电脑的新芯片
summary: Nvidia is entering the PC market with a new RTX Spark Superchip which will debut in laptop and desktop computers from leading PC brands including Dell and Lenovo this fall. CEO Jensen Huang made the announcement at the Computex trade show in Taipei. Bloomberg's Peter Elstrom reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kakao Union Calls for Strike Next Week After Wage Talks Stall
title_cn: 工资谈判陷入僵局后，Kakao 工会呼吁下周罢工
summary: Kakao Corp.’s labor union called for a four-hour strike next week, escalating a dispute with South Korea’s biggest messaging service after negotiations over compensation and job security broke down last month.

title: SoftBank Group Overtakes Toyota as Japan’s Most Valuable Company
title_cn: 软银集团超越丰田成为日本最有价值公司
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. overtook Toyota Motor Corp. as Japan’s most valuable company on Monday, marking a milestone for the global artificial intelligence boom and a dramatic reshuffling of the country’s corporate hierarchy.

title: Nvidia CEO Says Market Got it Wrong On Software Stocks | Insight with Haslinda Amin 6/1/2026
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官表示市场对软件股的看法是错误的哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 6/1/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India to Seek Relief From US Probes in Trade Deal Talks
title_cn: 印度将在贸易协议谈判中寻求美国调查的救济
summary: India will seek relief from US investigations when trade negotiators from the two nations meet this week for finalizing an interim trade pact, an official familiar with the matter said.

title: Shipping Magnate Says Greeks Have History of Breaking Blockades
title_cn: 航运巨头称希腊人有打破封锁的历史
summary: The boss of one of the few oil tanker fleets that continued to cross the Strait of Hormuz throughout the Iran war said the conflict has been a boon for shipping, while adding that Greek shipowners have a long history of breaking blockades.

title: Pro-Trump Outsider Wins Colombia Vote, Headed to Runoff
title_cn: 支持特朗普的局外人赢得哥伦比亚投票，进入决选
summary: Celebrity lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella unexpectedly topped the first round of Colombia’s presidential vote, as Latin America heads into another highly polarized election  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Little Known Supreme Court Doctrine That Helped Strike Down Trump's Tariffs
title_cn: 帮助降低特朗普关税的鲜为人知的最高法院学说
summary: This video explains the major questions doctrine and how the Supreme Court has used it to curb major agency actions by requiring clear approval from Congress for policies with significant economic or political impact. (Produced by Andrew Satter; Executive Producer Josh Block) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Has Most Taxes Since Era After Napoleonic Wars, Study Shows
title_cn: 研究显示，英国的税收是拿破仑战争后时代以来最高的
summary: Britain was still grappling with the explosion of government debt accumulated during the Napoleonic Wars and the industrial revolution was beginning to transform the world. In 1834, the UK had 90 taxes in place with duties on everything from servants to stage coaches.

title: Mandelson Refused to Hand Over Personal Phone to UK Probe
title_cn: 曼德尔森拒绝将个人电话交给英国调查
summary: The UK government released a vast trove of documents relating to Peter Mandelson’s appointment as US ambassador but the former envoy refused to allow them access to his personal phone, limiting the effort by Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s government to demonstrate transparency in relation to the calamitous hiring.

title: Merz Will Gather Leaders to Forge NATO Plan on Wooing Trump
title_cn: 默茨将召集领导人制定北约拉拢特朗普的计划
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz plans to host European leaders later this month to craft a plan to smooth relations with President Donald Trump at a NATO summit in July, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Iran to Halt Message Exchanges With US Over Israel, Tasnim Says
title_cn: 塔斯尼姆称伊朗将停止与美国就以色列问题进行信息交流
summary: Iran said it would halt talks with the US in protest over Israel’s expanded ground assault in Lebanon, escalating tensions as Washington and Tehran seek to reach an interim peace agreement.

title: Russia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is Unaffordable
title_cn: 俄罗斯财政官员告诉普京战争开支难以承受
summary: Senior government officials have warned Russian President Vladimir Putin that spending on the war in Ukraine is on an unaffordable path, the most serious sign of internal division in Moscow since the full-scale invasion began.

title: The Hidden Plumbing of Commodity Finance
title_cn: 商品金融的隐藏管道
summary:
On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Lewis Hart, head of corporate advisory and banking at Brown Brothers Harriman, joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss how the business of commodity finance actually works and the difference between financing a commodity you can hedge (like oil) versus one where there's no futures market (like cashews).
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: London Mayor Blames MAGA, Russia for Posts Attacking UK Capital
title_cn: 伦敦市长指责俄罗斯 MAGA 发布攻击英国首都的帖子
summary: Mayor of London Sadiq Khan blamed Donald Trump supporters and the Russian state for a wave of social media posts in recent months talking down the UK capital.

title: South Africa’s Gana to Head Presidential Impeachment Committee
title_cn: 南非加纳将担任总统弹劾委员会主席
summary: South African lawmakers elected Makashule Gana to head a multiparty panel that will hold an impeachment inquiry into President Cyril Ramaphosa’s handling of a robbery at his game farm.

title: Kushner Resort Draws Albanian Leader’s Support After Backlash
title_cn: 库什纳度假村在强烈反对后获得阿尔巴尼亚领导人的支持
summary: Albanian Prime Minister Edi Rama defended plans for a €4 billion ($4.7 billion) luxury resort promoted by Jared Kushner after protests erupted over preliminary work in a protected area on the Adriatic coast.

title: Hungary Seeks to Oust President in Purge of Orban Allies
title_cn: 匈牙利寻求推翻总统以清洗欧尔班盟友
summary: Hungary plans to amend the constitution to oust the country’s president as part of Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s push to dismantle Viktor Orban’s regime.

title: Germany’s €500 Billion Infrastructure Fund Has Sluggish Start
title_cn: 德国5000亿欧元基础设施基金启动缓慢
summary: Germany’s government is struggling to mobilize infrastructure spending from its flagship €500 billion ($582 billion) investment fund designed to revive Europe’s largest economy.

title: Republicans Return Facing Multiple Trials in Bid to Advance Agenda
title_cn: 共和党人回归面临多重审判以推进议程
summary: GOP lawmakers back in Washington will be tested over their hopes of a do-over

title: Kenya’s Affordable Housing Drive Is Leaving Many People Homeless
title_cn: 肯尼亚的经济适用房计划导致许多人无家可归
summary: Historic neighborhoods are being razed to make way for high rises, and the government doesn’t have a plan for relocating evicted residents.

title: Russia Bans Jet Fuel Exports After Record Refinery Attacks
title_cn: 炼油厂遭遇创纪录袭击后，俄罗斯禁止航空燃油出口
summary: Smoke rises above buildings following a recent drone attack on the Tuapse oil refinery in Tuapse, Krasnodar region on April 29, 2026, amid the ongoing Russian-Ukrainian conflict. (Photo by AFP via Getty Images)

title: Taiwan No. 2 Visits Palau, Countering China’s Isolation Bid
title_cn: 台湾二号访问帕劳，反击中国的孤立举动
summary: Taiwanese Vice President Hsiao Bi-khim is making her first overseas trip to a diplomatic ally as the democracy’s No. 2 official, countering China’s isolation campaign.

title: Pro-Trump Outsider Wins Colombia Vote, Sets Up Heated Runoff
title_cn: 支持特朗普的局外人赢得哥伦比亚投票，引发激烈决选
summary: Celebrity lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella unexpectedly topped the first round of Colombia’s presidential vote, as Latin America heads into another highly polarized election.

title: Starmer Braces for Release of Hundreds of Mandelson Messages
title_cn: 斯塔默准备发布数百条曼德尔森信息
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer will be forced to publish hundreds of private exchanges between the UK’s disgraced former ambassador, Peter Mandelson, and members of his government, disclosures that are likely to put his beleaguered premiership in further danger.

title: India, Myanmar Agree to Accelerate Work on Thailand Highway
title_cn: 印度和缅甸同意加快泰国高速公路建设
summary: India and Myanmar agreed to fast-track infrastructure projects to strengthen economic ties, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi hosted Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing on his first overseas trip since taking office after a widely criticized election.

title: Farmer Frustrations With Trump Spell Trouble for Iowa Republicans
title_cn: 农民对特朗普的不满给爱荷华州共和党人带来麻烦
summary: A competitive governor’s race and close congressional contests in the midwestern bellwether portend a possible Democratic wave in November

title: Philippines’ VP Duterte Asks Senate to Dismiss Impeachment Case
title_cn: 菲律宾副总统杜特尔特要求参议院驳回弹劾案
summary: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte has asked the Senate to throw out the impeachment case against her ahead of the trial, in a bid to thwart a second attempt by opponents to ban her from politics.

title: Spain Vies to Place European To Lead UN Food Agency After 50 Years
title_cn: 西班牙力争让欧洲人领导联合国粮食机构 50 年后
summary: Spain is seeking to place a European at the top of the world’s largest food agency for the first time in more than five decades.

title: Colombian Voters Cast Old Order Into the Abyss
title_cn: 哥伦比亚选民将旧秩序抛入深渊
summary: The presidential election first round threw up an unexpected result that sets up a tense runoff.

title: France Boards Another Tanker Tied to Russian Oil Trade
title_cn: 法国登上另一艘与俄罗斯石油贸易有关的油轮
summary: France’s navy boarded another oil tanker on the high seas after it sailed from Russia, the latest move in a global crackdown on shadow-fleet vessels used to export sanctioned crude.
